item.summary: Failed Capsule Specifications: Out of specification results obtained during routine stability testing for Loss on Drying of Capsule Shells. Product details: Omega-3-Acid, Ethyl Esters, Capsules, USP, 1 gram, 50 capsules (5 x 10 unit dose blister cards) per carton, Rx only, Packaged and Distributed by: Major Pharmaceuticals, Indianapolis, IN 46288. NDC: 0904-7495-06
item.remedy: Affected quantity: 2,238 5 x 10 unit dose cartons
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
